summary: Build a service-based company website for “Ethical Bytes” with core marketing pages and listed services (website making, website design, graphic design).

existing_features.title: Create a multi-page company website named “Ethical Bytes” with top-level navigation and routes for: Home, About, Services, Pricing, and Contact Us.

Populate the Services page with service sections for: Website Development ("website making"), Website Design, and Graphic Design, and optionally add additional relevant services that fit a digital studio (e.g., branding, UI/UX, SEO basics) without changing the core three requested services.

Create a Pricing page with at least three pricing tiers (e.g., Starter, Professional, Enterprise) that map sensibly to the listed services, with clear included features and a primary call-to-action linking to the Contact Us page.
Create an About page describing Ethical Bytes as a service-based company with a short mission/values section emphasizing ethical, transparent work, and a brief “How we work” section.
Implement a Contact Us page with a form (name, email, company/optional, service interest dropdown, message) and submit the inquiry to the backend for storage; show success and error states in the UI.

Apply a coherent, creative visual theme for the Ethical Bytes brand (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) and use it consistently across all pages; avoid blue/purple as the primary palette.
Generate and include static brand imagery in the app (stored under frontend/public/assets/generated) and use them on the Home page and/or header/footer.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create “Ethical Bytes” service-based company website with pages: Home, About, Pricing, Services, Contact Us; include services: website making, website design, graphic design (and any additional relevant content).
Add backend support for storing contact inquiries with timestamps, and provide a query method to list inquiries (intended for internal use; no public admin UI required).

imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal modern wordmark logo reading “Ethical Bytes” (ethical-bytes-logo.dim_512x256.png)
- Abstract ethical-tech hero illustration with geometric circuit motifs, neutral palette with a warm accent (ethical-bytes-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
- Set of 3 simple line icons representing web development, web design, and graphic design (ethical-bytes-service-icons.dim_512x512.png)

generatedImages.description: Minimal modern wordmark logo reading “Ethical Bytes”
Abstract ethical-tech hero illustration with geometric circuit motifs, neutral palette with a warm accent
Set of 3 simple line icons representing web development, web design, and graphic design
